notes:
Production reasoning + cache policy clarifications, image cancel/download UX, ZAYA CCA cache hardening.

Production-eligible (live-proven):
- ZAYA1-8B + ZAYA1-VL-8B all profiles (MXFP4, JANGTQ4, JANGTQ_K) — Thinking buttons exposed for all profiles; user picks Auto/On/Off per quality preference
- Qwen3.6-35B MoE: text + image + video, paged+ssm+disk
- Ling JANGTQ: hybrid SSM (28 GLA + 4 MLA), /v1/responses multi-turn cache reuse (non-reasoning model — Thinking UI disabled engine + panel)
- Hy3 JANGTQ2: 80 TurboQuantKVCache layers, Low/High reasoning effort picker (no Medium), Hunyuan tools + qwen3 reasoning parser
- MiniMax JANGTQ: 43+ visible tok/s with SIMD-shuffle Hadamard kernel fix

Image gen hardened:
- Cancel reports as user-cancel + best-effort /v1/images/cancel (no false server-crash)
- Download events carry canonical model/quant identity (eliminates wrong-model validation race)
- ImageModelPicker activeDownload state machine refactored

ZAYA CCA cache hardening:
- Clean-prefill store policy for ArraysCache (avoids bad single-active snapshot path)
- ZAYA-VL stale _media_cache_extra_keys fetch warning fixed
- Typed zaya_cca_v1 cache stays the production path (generic TQ-KV intentionally OFF for path-dependent CCA state)

Build pipeline:
- Local install builder pre-signs bundled Python native Mach-O before sealing (permanent fix for SciPy _arpacklib errSecInternalComponent)
- Production code free of hardcoded user paths and private-doc references

Note on ZAYA quant profiles: previous bit-profile reasoning clamp removed — all profiles expose Thinking buttons. JANGTQ_K (mixed-bit 4/2/2) may produce lower-quality reasoning than JANGTQ4 / MXFP4; pick Auto (default-off thinking) for best results, or use JANGTQ4 / MXFP4 if forcing thinking-on.
